title: Friday Sermon 17 March 2000
description:
The usual practice forbids the offering of prayers when the sun is at its zenith.  Nonetheless it is from the Ahadith to at on Friday the prayers may be offered even at midday.  In this regard there are two narrations from 'Sunan Abu Dawud':*

Hazrat Abu Qatadah narrates from the Holy Prophet ﷺ that he disapproved of the offering of prayer at the meridian except on Friday.  Similarly aAyyas bin Salamah bin al-Akwah relates from his father ,'We used to back after offering Friday prayers together with the Holy Prophet ﷺ while the walls had still not cast any shadows'.

* Abu Dawud al-Sijistani.
